goal: Find and fix the bug in stats.py so that all tests in test_stats.py pass without modifying the tests.
scope: Fix the mean() function to correctly calculate the average of numbers
Verify variance() and stdev() functions work correctly with the fixed mean()
flags: The mean() function has a bug on line 2: it divides by (len(numbers) + 1) instead of len(numbers), causing all mean calculations to be incorrect
